sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_ngram (id UInt32, text String);
INSERT INTO test_ngram VALUES (1, 'ClickHouse is fast.'), (2, 'ClickHouse rocks!');
SELECT ngramMinHash(text) AS hashes FROM test_ngram WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_ngram SET text = 'ClickHouse database!' WHERE id = 2;
SELECT ngramMinHash(text, 4, 8) AS hashes FROM test_ngram;
